context_text: <B> really it's really an excuse that we use with ourselves when my stepfather wa had his surgery / <A> uh-huh / <B> i had been off cigarettes about a year / <A> uh-huh / <B> and while he was in surgery i was in the waiting room smoking i went back to smoking after he's having cancer surgery / <A> mhm / <B> isn't that awful / <A> mhm / <B> worst part / <A> yeah
